text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing, Trainer! Are you sure you want
to give them to me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll treasure your gift forever!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Aw, we're like carrots in a planter already. You're
gonna love my roommate Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Let's all do our best together from now on!
